home.algorithms_title: ### AI Algorithms Used in This App:

ligand.title: Prepare Ligand
ligand.info_upload: Upload an SDF file, or draw a molecular structure/paste SMILES in the canvas below.
ligand.draw_or_paste: **Or** draw a molecular structure/paste SMILES below:
ligand.error_no_molecule: No valid molecule found in SDF file
ligand.batch_info: Upload a CSV file where each row contains a molecule's SMILES and name. Column names should be 'smiles' and 'mol_name'.
ligand.error_batch_columns: CSV file must contain both 'smiles' and 'mol_name' columns
ligand.error_csv_parse: CSV file parsing failed. Please check the file format.
pocket.title: Pocket Prediction
dock.title: Molecular Docking
dock.instruction: Upload a protein (PDB format) and ligand (SDF format), and set docking parameters.
dock.info_pocket_csv: Optional: Upload pocket prediction results CSV file to auto-populate docking grid parameters.
dock.warning_csv_format: Incorrect Center format in CSV file. Cannot auto-populate grid parameters.
dock.warning_no_center: Center column not found in CSV file. Cannot auto-populate grid parameters.
dock.error_missing_files: Please upload both protein (pdb) and ligand (sdf) files first.
dock.error_result_file: Error processing result file. Please check path or permissions.
batch.title: Batch Molecular Docking
batch.job_id_input: Enter Job ID to check status
batch.error_no_pdb: Corresponding protein PDB file not found. Cannot visualize.
batch.info_no_results: No docking result files found in ZIP.
batch.success_pocket_loaded: Pocket data loaded successfully. Total records: {count}
batch.uploader_ligands: Upload Ligand Files (ZIP or multiple upload)
batch.success_task_created: Task created! Please save your Job ID: **{job_id}**
batch.warning_task_limit: Warning: Current task count exceeds 20. Please modify the task CSV file to reduce the number of tasks.
batch.error_task_limit: Error: Task count cannot exceed 200 (current: {count}). Please modify the task file and retry.
batch.success_started: Task {job_id} started in background. Please save the ID for future queries.
affinity.title: Affinity Prediction
affinity.instruction: On this page, you can predict binding affinity between small molecules and proteins. Choose single or batch prediction mode.
affinity.single_title: Single Protein and Small Molecule Binding Affinity Prediction
affinity.error_no_protein: Please upload a protein PDB file.
affinity.error_no_ligand: Please upload a small molecule SDF file.
affinity.error_no_output: Prediction completed but output CSV file not found.
affinity.batch_title: Batch Protein and Small Molecule Affinity Prediction
affinity.batch_uploader: Upload Protein PDB Files and Small Molecule SDF Files (batch upload supported)
affinity.error_no_pdb: No PDB files found in uploaded files. Please upload at least one PDB file.
affinity.error_no_sdf: No SDF files found in uploaded files. Please upload at least one SDF file.
affinity.warning_file_format: File {filename} has incorrect naming format (error: {error}). Skipping this file.
affinity.error_no_tasks: No valid tasks generated. Please check SDF file naming format.
affinity.spinner_batch_predicting: Performing batch affinity prediction, please wait...
affinity.error_batch_failed: Batch prediction encountered a critical error: {error}
affinity.info_no_data: No prediction results. Please first perform predictions in the 'Affinity Prediction' tab.
task.title: 📋 Task Manager
task.info_no_jobs: No task records found. Please submit a task in 'Batch Molecular Docking' first.
task.error_no_pdb: Corresponding protein PDB file not found.
task.info_no_results: No docking result files found in ZIP.
